Powering 500+ assets per facility

The best operators don't react. They already know.

Your members expect every machine to work. Your board expects every dollar to be justified. Your team expects to know before something breaks. Ecofit makes all three possible — in real time, across every location.

How It Works

Three steps to knowing everything your competitors don't.

Connect your existing equipment. See everything in real time. Walk into every board meeting as the most informed operator in the room.

Step 1 — Connect

Live in days. Every manufacturer. No IT team required.

We connect to the equipment you already have — every brand, every location. No rip-and-replace. No new hardware. Live data from day one.

The Cost of Not Knowing

Reactive repairs cost 3–5x more than planned ones.

40%
Average reduction in equipment refresh costs within 12 months
Step 2 — See Everything

Every asset. Every location. Right now.

Floor Intelligence

Know which zones are working — and which are bleeding members.

Heatmaps show real member movement — not assumptions. Optimize layout before you spend on new equipment.

Data Infrastructure

Built for enterprise scale

Live equipment telemetry — sub-60-second refresh across all assets
Works with existing CCTV — no rip-and-replace, connects in days
Multi-brand, multi-location — global deployments supported
Step 3 — Own the Room

Walk in knowing what nobody else does.

Complete network intelligence. Know which locations are outperforming. Know what's trending toward failure. Walk into every board meeting as the most informed operator in the room.

Austin · 91%
Denver · 84%
Phoenix · 72%
Dallas · 61%
Miami · 48%
Scale

From one location to a national chain

The same intelligence layer that runs a 3-location operator runs a 300-location network. No IT team required.

3.2x
Longer equipment lifespan
200+
Assets networked per facility

What Operators Say

What operators say once they can see everything.

"We went from defending gut-feel capex decisions to walking into board meetings with utilization data per machine. That conversation was completely different."

JR
Jamie Rodriguez
VP Operations · 14-location chain

"Our maintenance team used to run on complaints. Now they run on a schedule. Unplanned repair spend dropped within the first quarter."

SK
Sara Kim
COO · Regional fitness brand

"We identified three underperforming locations in the first month. Two of them we fixed with floor layout changes — no new equipment required. The data paid for itself before the first invoice."

MT
Marcus Torres
CEO · 28-location franchise group
